name: HWR_ASSIGNMENT_B
description: The assignment table stores the assignments of tasks to resources.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the unique assignment ID.

columns.Name: PROJECT_KEY
columns.Comments: This is the unique key of the project that contains the assignment.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_KEY
columns.Comments: This is the unique key of the assignment within the project.

columns.Name: TASK_ID
columns.Comments: This refers to the TASK_ID in HWR_TASK_B.

columns.Name: RESOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This refers to RESOURCE_ID in HWR_RESOURCE_B.

columns.Name: RESOURCE_KEY
columns.Comments: This refers to RESOURCE_KEY in HWR_RESOURCE_B.

columns.Name: PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the profile Id of the assigned user.

columns.Name: HOURS_OF_WORK
columns.Comments: This stores the number of hours on the assignment.

columns.Name: RESOURCE_PERCENT
columns.Comments: This stores the percent of resources used for the assignment.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
